title: Joann Collins
compiled_truth: Joann Collins is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-05), Joann Collins sent 61 and received 720 emails, totalling 781 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (52), [Victor Lamadrid](people/victor-lamadrid) (24), [Robert Allwein](people/robert-allwein) (20), [Joan Veselack](people/joan-veselack) (17), [Dick Jenkins](people/dick-jenkins) (16).
